mainEntity.name: Deadlines for updating AI content after Texas law changes in Houston?
mainEntity.text: Deadlines for updating AI content after Texas law changes in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: Update within 7-14 days for Houston firms to maintain GEO freshness; signals authority to AIs like Grok.

suggestedAnswer.text: TX legislature sessions end May; refresh content pre-search spikes. Automate alerts via Google Alerts. Delays drop rankings 30%; tie to firm newsletters.

name: Content Update Deadlines Post-TX Law Changes
description: Update within 7-14 days for Houston firms to maintain GEO freshness; signals authority to AIs like Grok.
